[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000100010 2
1 101010001 4
2 110100110 5
3 110111011 7
4 001110010 4
5 000001101 3
6 001111011 6
7 111100000 4
